boundary_rule: Each axis uses a half-open [min, max) interval.
max_boundary_assignment_rule: A coordinate exactly equal to the grid maximum on an axis is assigned to the last cell on that axis.

profile_scope.confirmed_for: frame 1051 pilot PDL=1.0 binary PLY asset generation
profile_scope.not_equivalent_to: official world coordinates, metric coordinates, or final full-sequence experimental grid

provenance.grid_origin: derived from full-sequence raw-coordinate envelope scan
provenance.grid_max: derived from full-sequence raw-coordinate envelope scan
provenance.grid_extent: derived from full-sequence raw-coordinate envelope scan
provenance.cell_size: derived from full-sequence raw-coordinate envelope scan and G128 dimensions
provenance.coordinate_limit: raw-coordinate values are not interpreted as official physical coordinates or meters
